notes: Honest capability reporting. preToolHook=true means a documented native PreToolUse-style surface exists; gradedGuarantee describes what is actually enforceable.

openclaw.gradedGuarantee: Native before_tool_call / after_tool_call via @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-plugin. Full dispatcher-layer when plugin is active.

cursor.gradedGuarantee: Cursor hooks (preToolUse / beforeMCPExecution) can deny tool calls when hooks.json is installed and trusted. Not gateway-non-bypassable; operator can disable hooks. Cloud agents may defer some MCP hooks.

claude-code.gradedGuarantee: Claude Code PreToolUse / PostToolUse hooks can deny via permissionDecision. Operator can disable hooks or use --dangerously-skip-permissions. Prompt-layer skills already work under .claude/skills/.

codex.gradedGuarantee: Codex PreToolUse hooks can deny (exit 2 / permissionDecision). Coverage is graded: shell/Bash is reliable; apply_patch and some MCP paths have historically had gaps. Trigger frontmatter for skills remains partial. Default dispositionMode=unattended (no operator approval UI).
